title: senecio carnerensis
intro: Senecio carnerensis, also known as Blue Dust or Blue Angel, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family that is native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Senecio carnerensis include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Senecio carnerensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their effects.
